programme.title: Jon Thelen's Destination Fish
programme.desc: Fall has arrived, and Jon heads to North Dakota's Devils Lake, where cool water temps and bait migrations trigger a powerful walleye bite. Then it's off to Minnesota's Lake Vermilion, where he wraps up the trip with a lesson in precision, working deep rock structures and clean jigging patterns for quality fish.
